name: Tomatoes a La Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes in half.
2. Melt the butter in a frying pan.
3. Add the tomato halves, cut side down to the pan.
4. Puncture the rounded sides with a sharp knife to prevent them from curling up.
5. Cook for 5 minutes, turn and cook another 10 minutes. Repeat until all tomatoes are cooked through (approximately 20 minutes total).
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
7. Add cream and mix with juices in the pan.
8. Serve on hot plates, pouring the juices over the tomatoes and garnish with parsley or watercress.
Makes 6 servings.
